item.title: Norwegian Cruise Line stock is rising. A big activist reportedly has taken a stake.
item.description: Norwegian Cruise Line shares rose on Tuesday after a report an activist investor has taken a stake and plans to shake up the struggling company.

item.title: The math is getting challenging: economic realities start to bite as UBS downgrades U.S. tech stocks
item.description: UBS global head of equities thinks the question of how to turn capex into profits is becoming more challenging for AI developers to answer as funding ...

item.title: Why has Kris Jenner’s $13.5 million ‘Keeping Up With the Kardashians’ house sat on the market for over a year?
item.description: Kris Jenner listed the Hidden Hills home with much fanfare, but none of the hoopla appears to have moved the needle on the sale of the property.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg may be the latest California tycoon to buy in Miami’s ‘Billionaire Bunker’
item.description: Facebook billionaire Mark Zuckerberg has reportedly snapped up an extraordinary waterfront mansion on Miami’s infamous Billionaire Bunker.

item.title: Gold prices tumble below $5,000 as China holidays dent support
item.description: Gold’s fragile hold on $5,000 an ounce gave way to selling on Tuesday.
